---
name: Bug report
about: Report an unexpected problem or behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear description of what actually happened.

## Impact
- [ ] Critical (system down, security issue)
- [ ] High (major functionality broken)
- [ ] Medium (affects some users)
- [ ] Low (minor inconvenience)

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 12.1]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 98, Firefox 97]
- Version: [e.g. v1.2.3]

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## References
- Related issues: #
- Documentation: 
- External links:

## Exit Criteria
- [ ] Bug is reproducible in development environment
- [ ] Root cause identified
- [ ] Fix implemented and tested
- [ ] Regression tests added
